title: Barbers of Sullust
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Barbers of Sullust''' were a group of [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] hair stylists who eventually supplanted the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] for control over the barber business. By [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], they had acquired nearly all of the major [[Core Worlds/Legends|central system]] franchises in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Cultural [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] noted the irony in the fact that these renowned styling artists lacked hair themselves.<ref name="GPB&TG">[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]</ref>

After the end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Zenn Bien]] received a degree from the Barbers of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], and opened a beauty salon, [[The Kindest Cut]], on [[New Balosar]].<ref name="MF">[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']]</ref>
